annotations.title: Be not angry in the way.
annotations.text: Travellers in journey are easily provoked to anger and brawling especially if they avoid not probable occasions <mn>◦</mn>. Therefore Joseph admonisheth his brothers to beware thereof, lest in talking of him, and how they had sold him to strangers, some of them might accuse others, and excuse themselves, and so fall into new offences. S. Chrys. ho. 64. in Gen.

notes.text: Occasion of sin to be avoided.
